parameters.query: SELECT id, canonical_domain, company_name, country, territory, west_telco_product, priority_score FROM builtwith_company_targets WHERE enrichment_status = 'pending' AND canonical_domain IS NOT NULL ORDER BY priority_score DESC LIMIT 100

=UPDATE builtwith_company_targets SET
  enrichment_status = '{{ $json.enrichment_status }}',
  first_contact_name = {{ $json.first_contact_name ? `'${$json.first_contact_name.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  first_contact_email = {{ $json.first_contact_email ? `'${$json.first_contact_email}'` : 'NULL' }},
  has_contact_email = {{ $json.has_contact_email || false }},
  has_contact_name = {{ $json.has_contact_name || false }},
  verification_status = '{{ $json.verification_status }}',
  verification_score = {{ $json.verification_score || 0 }},
  verification_source = '{{ $json.verification_source }}',
  verification_reason = {{ $json.verification_reason ? `'${$json.verification_reason.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  verified_at = NOW(),
  next_enrichment_step = {{ $json.next_enrichment_step ? `'${$json.next_enrichment_step}'` : 'NULL' }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.target_id }}
RETURNING id, enrichment_status, first_contact_email

=INSERT INTO agent_runs (agent_name, trigger_type, input_scope, processed_count, success_count, error_count, blocked_count, estimated_cost_usd, status, finished_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.agent_name }}',
  '{{ $json.trigger_type }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.input_scope) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.processed_count }},
  {{ $json.success_count }},
  {{ $json.error_count }},
  {{ $json.blocked_count }},
  {{ $json.estimated_cost_usd }},
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, processed_count, success_count

parameters.subject: =✅ Enriquecimiento completado · {{ $json.success_count }} nuevos leads ready
